Subtle navigation-tree selection (fixes the sidebar icon).

### Changed
- The **playlist sidebar / navigation trees** now use a **subtle** selection (their own dark background + light accent text) instead of the bright content accent — the correct treatment for navigation. This also fixes the sidebar icon: it stays a clean glyph and never fills into a square.

### Reverted
- The experimental column-header nudge (it had no visual effect).

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
